title: Product announcement email
response:
Subject: Your notes just went offline-proof 📝

Hey there,

Big news: Notely now works fully offline.

Head into a tunnel, board a flight, or wander somewhere with zero bars — you can keep writing, editing, and organizing without missing a beat. The moment you're back online, everything syncs automatically. No manual saving, no "did that go through?" second-guessing.

Offline Mode works seamlessly across both mobile and desktop, so your notes stay with you wherever you are and whatever device you grab.

And the best part? It's available today for everyone — including our free plan users. No upgrade required, no waiting list. Just open the app and start writing.

We built this because your best ideas don't wait for a good connection, and neither should you.

**Try Offline Mode now — open Notely and go offline.**

Happy note-taking,
The Notely Team
scoreDetail: completeness: 9/10, tone: 8/10, structure: 8/10, length compliance: 9/10 — All three key points are present and clear, tone is warm without being cringey, structure is scannable with one bolded CTA, and length fits the 120-160 word range.
